text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
My top oshi from the younger generation is
running in the NHK Mile Cup—like me last
year—so I've brought some friends to the
racecourse to support her!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: And OMG she did AMAZING. I've seen so many runners up until now, and now I'm witnessing the birth of a new generation. Uh-oh, I think my feels are starting to get to me. Somebody help.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'm no longer just chasing after my favorite Umas.
Now the next generation is chasing after me! I
need to set a good example for them.
